name: Friendship Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box yellow, white, or lemon cake mix
1 4-serving size box instant vanilla or lemon pudding mix
Optional: 1/4 to 1/2 cup of Friendship Fruit liquid
1/4 cup orange juice, brandy, or rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, and oil into a large bowl.
2. Stir with a spoon or beat with an electric mixer until well mixed and smooth.
3. Stir in the drained fruit and any desired optional ingredients.
4. Grease and flour a tube or Bundt pan.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about one hour, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Baking times may vary greatly due to the starter, fruit, and additional ingredients; increase by 30 minutes or more if necessary.
8. Cool the cake for 10 minutes in the pan on a wire rack. Turn out of the pan and allow to cool to room temperature on the rack.
9. Slowly pour the hot glaze over the cooled cake.
10. Makes 12 servings.
Glaze:
1. Combine sugar, water, and orange juice (or brandy or rum) in a saucepan.
2. Add margarine and bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Pour the hot syrup slowly over the cooled cake.
